# NEMA IEC body phantom (IEC 61675-1 / NEMA NU 2-2018), contrast-recovery QA. Six hot
# fillable spheres (10-37 mm) in a warm body, with a cold low-density lung insert. Geometry
# from the Data Spectrum datasheet (research/knowledge/spect-qa-phantom-geometry/).
# Sphere:background activity-concentration ratio = 4:1 (edit the histories to change it).
#
# IncludeFile fragment: Ge/IEC* (Parent World) + a warm-background source and one hot source
# per sphere. Sphere walls (~1 mm PMMA) are not modeled (assumption; small attenuation).
# Emits 140.5 keV gamma (Tc-99m). Generated by tools/make_qa_phantom.py.

# Low-density lung foam: polystyrene at 0.3 g/cm3 (styrofoam+water average, NEMA NU 2).
sv:Ma/Styrofoam/Components = 2 "Carbon" "Hydrogen"
uv:Ma/Styrofoam/Fractions = 2 0.9226 0.0774
d:Ma/Styrofoam/Density = 0.3 g/cm3

s:Ge/IECShell/Type = "G4EllipticalTube"
s:Ge/IECShell/Parent = "World"
s:Ge/IECShell/Material = "G4_PLEXIGLASS"
d:Ge/IECShell/HLX = 148.2 mm
d:Ge/IECShell/HLY = 113.7 mm
d:Ge/IECShell/HLZ = 99.7 mm
s:Ge/IECShell/Color = "grey"
s:Ge/IECShell/DrawingStyle = "WireFrame"
s:Ge/IECWater/Type = "G4EllipticalTube"
s:Ge/IECWater/Parent = "IECShell"
s:Ge/IECWater/Material = "G4_WATER"
d:Ge/IECWater/HLX = 145.0 mm
d:Ge/IECWater/HLY = 110.5 mm
d:Ge/IECWater/HLZ = 96.5 mm
s:Ge/IECWater/Color = "lightblue"

# cold lung insert (45 mm ID foam cylinder, on axis)
s:Ge/IECLung/Type = "TsCylinder"
s:Ge/IECLung/Parent = "IECWater"
s:Ge/IECLung/Material = "Styrofoam"
d:Ge/IECLung/RMax = 22.5 mm
d:Ge/IECLung/HL = 92.5 mm
s:Ge/IECLung/Color = "white"

# six hot spheres
s:Ge/Sph0/Type = "TsSphere"
s:Ge/Sph0/Parent = "IECWater"
s:Ge/Sph0/Material = "G4_WATER"
d:Ge/Sph0/RMax = 5.00 mm
d:Ge/Sph0/TransX = 57.20 mm
d:Ge/Sph0/TransY = 0.00 mm
d:Ge/Sph0/TransZ = 26.50 mm
s:Ge/Sph0/Color = "red"
s:Ge/Sph1/Type = "TsSphere"
s:Ge/Sph1/Parent = "IECWater"
s:Ge/Sph1/Material = "G4_WATER"
d:Ge/Sph1/RMax = 6.50 mm
d:Ge/Sph1/TransX = 28.60 mm
d:Ge/Sph1/TransY = 49.54 mm
d:Ge/Sph1/TransZ = 26.50 mm
s:Ge/Sph1/Color = "red"
s:Ge/Sph2/Type = "TsSphere"
s:Ge/Sph2/Parent = "IECWater"
s:Ge/Sph2/Material = "G4_WATER"
d:Ge/Sph2/RMax = 8.50 mm
d:Ge/Sph2/TransX = -28.60 mm
d:Ge/Sph2/TransY = 49.54 mm
d:Ge/Sph2/TransZ = 26.50 mm
s:Ge/Sph2/Color = "red"
s:Ge/Sph3/Type = "TsSphere"
s:Ge/Sph3/Parent = "IECWater"
s:Ge/Sph3/Material = "G4_WATER"
d:Ge/Sph3/RMax = 11.00 mm
d:Ge/Sph3/TransX = -57.20 mm
d:Ge/Sph3/TransY = 0.00 mm
d:Ge/Sph3/TransZ = 26.50 mm
s:Ge/Sph3/Color = "red"
s:Ge/Sph4/Type = "TsSphere"
s:Ge/Sph4/Parent = "IECWater"
s:Ge/Sph4/Material = "G4_WATER"
d:Ge/Sph4/RMax = 14.00 mm
d:Ge/Sph4/TransX = -28.60 mm
d:Ge/Sph4/TransY = -49.54 mm
d:Ge/Sph4/TransZ = 26.50 mm
s:Ge/Sph4/Color = "red"
s:Ge/Sph5/Type = "TsSphere"
s:Ge/Sph5/Parent = "IECWater"
s:Ge/Sph5/Material = "G4_WATER"
d:Ge/Sph5/RMax = 18.50 mm
d:Ge/Sph5/TransX = 28.60 mm
d:Ge/Sph5/TransY = -49.54 mm
d:Ge/Sph5/TransZ = 26.50 mm
s:Ge/Sph5/Color = "red"

# warm background (children excluded so lung stays cold and spheres get their own source)
s:So/IECBkg/Type = "Volumetric"
s:So/IECBkg/Component = "IECWater"
s:So/IECBkg/VolumetricParticle = "gamma"
d:So/IECBkg/VolumetricEnergy = 140.5 keV
s:So/IECBkg/ActiveMaterial = "G4_WATER"
b:So/IECBkg/RecursivelyIncludeChildren = "False"
i:So/IECBkg/NumberOfHistoriesInRun = 100000

# hot spheres: histories = ratio (4) x background-concentration x sphere volume, so
# the sphere:background CONCENTRATION ratio is exact. Small spheres get few counts by design
# (that is why they are hard to recover); scale all histories up together for real statistics.
s:So/Sph0Src/Type = "Volumetric"
s:So/Sph0Src/Component = "Sph0"
s:So/Sph0Src/VolumetricParticle = "gamma"
d:So/Sph0Src/VolumetricEnergy = 140.5 keV
s:So/Sph0Src/ActiveMaterial = "G4_WATER"
i:So/Sph0Src/NumberOfHistoriesInRun = 22
s:So/Sph1Src/Type = "Volumetric"
s:So/Sph1Src/Component = "Sph1"
s:So/Sph1Src/VolumetricParticle = "gamma"
d:So/Sph1Src/VolumetricEnergy = 140.5 keV
s:So/Sph1Src/ActiveMaterial = "G4_WATER"
i:So/Sph1Src/NumberOfHistoriesInRun = 47
s:So/Sph2Src/Type = "Volumetric"
s:So/Sph2Src/Component = "Sph2"
s:So/Sph2Src/VolumetricParticle = "gamma"
d:So/Sph2Src/VolumetricEnergy = 140.5 keV
s:So/Sph2Src/ActiveMaterial = "G4_WATER"
i:So/Sph2Src/NumberOfHistoriesInRun = 106
s:So/Sph3Src/Type = "Volumetric"
s:So/Sph3Src/Component = "Sph3"
s:So/Sph3Src/VolumetricParticle = "gamma"
d:So/Sph3Src/VolumetricEnergy = 140.5 keV
s:So/Sph3Src/ActiveMaterial = "G4_WATER"
i:So/Sph3Src/NumberOfHistoriesInRun = 230
s:So/Sph4Src/Type = "Volumetric"
s:So/Sph4Src/Component = "Sph4"
s:So/Sph4Src/VolumetricParticle = "gamma"
d:So/Sph4Src/VolumetricEnergy = 140.5 keV
s:So/Sph4Src/ActiveMaterial = "G4_WATER"
i:So/Sph4Src/NumberOfHistoriesInRun = 473
s:So/Sph5Src/Type = "Volumetric"
s:So/Sph5Src/Component = "Sph5"
s:So/Sph5Src/VolumetricParticle = "gamma"
d:So/Sph5Src/VolumetricEnergy = 140.5 keV
s:So/Sph5Src/ActiveMaterial = "G4_WATER"
i:So/Sph5Src/NumberOfHistoriesInRun = 1092
